title: Internet of things (iot) module of multiple channels
abstract: The present invention relates to the Internet of Things (IoT) module. The invention relates to a module which can be used to transmit any kind of data in digital or analogue structure and receive data in digital or analogue structure transmitted thereto. Said module is also a device which can receive the signals and data in the form of analogue or digital structure connectable thereto by means of at least one input/output channel thereon, and which can convert analog signals into digital signals and digital signals into analog signals. The subject module is also characterized by producing the necessary digital signals by itself, converting the digital signals produced by itself or coming into it from the outside into analogue data, transmitting the digital signals to the other locations through radio signals (RF, Bluetooth, etc.) or cellular communications networks (GSM).
claims: Claims 1. An Internet of Things (loT) module of multiple channels characterized in that it comprises at least one microprocessor (1 ), a wireless communication module (2) operating in connection with said microprocessor (1 ), analogously or digitally adjustable at least one data input/output ports (4) connected to the same microprocessor (1 ), at least one digital-to-analog converter (DAC) (5) connected to the same microprocessor (1 ) and capable of converting digital data into analog signal, and at least one analog-to-digital converter (ADC) (6) connected to the same microprocessor (1 ) and capable of converting an analog signal into digital data. 2. An Internet of Things (loT) module of multiple channels according to claim 1 , characterized in that it comprises DAC data input port (5a) and DAC data output port (5b) on said digital-to-analog converter (DAC) (5). 3. An Internet of Things (loT) module of multiple channels according to claim 1 , characterized in that it comprises ADC data input port (6a) and ADC data output port (6b) on said analog-to-digital converter (ADC) (6). 4. An Internet of Things (loT) module of multiple channels according to claim 1 , characterized in that it comprises at least one universal serial bus (USB) port (7) and universal data path module (3) which connects said Internet of Things (loT) module of multiple channels (8) to the outer world by wire and which are connected to the microprocessor (1 ).
